microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's recovery validation program from a **2-person operation** into a platformized system, standardizing workflows to sustain 45+ annual resilience drills and drive **$14M+ business impact** across enterprise customers including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led **0→1 development** of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining product requirements and self-service scheduling capabilities that reduced operational toil by 30% and transitioned execution to a scalable, repeatable model.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability, delivering a rack-level drill program in 4 months with a **94% recovery rate**, surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a new continuous-validation standard.
Directed 14 cross-org recovery executions under executive visibility, including serving as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a **$1.5B+ enterprise contract**.

Built an internal **AI agent** to automate drill planning workflows, reducing planning cycle time by 39% and increasing drill capacity by 21% — demonstrating hands-on LLM-powered tooling aligned to Okta's AI-identity mission.
microsoft_2023: Championed **product adoption** for AI-driven code generation workflows, conducting live demos and technical training sessions that drove utilization across 14 key Azure service teams and saved **37 engineering hours monthly**.

Influenced the roadmap to include intent-based YAML generation by facilitating **11+ discovery interviews** with Azure service teams, surfacing critical feature gaps and translating customer feedback directly into prioritized requirements.

Improved data integrity and retrieval by implementing metadata standards and migrating documentation to an **AI-powered semantic search** tool, cutting average lookup time by 83% across internal engineering teams.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched Azure regions 28% faster by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework spanning 140+ service teams.

Mobilized a product strategy to reduce operational toil during region launches, conducting discovery with 20+ service teams to quantify **81 hours of manual effort** per region and building a roadmap to automate critical execution paths.
Enabled leadership to identify automation gaps and prioritize high-impact investments by engineering a **Power BI dashboard** tracking operational toil signals across 140+ teams in real time.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot transition by defining the legacy OS migration strategy, mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations, and coordinating cross-functional sign-off across IT and Engineering.

Facilitated Agile sprint planning and retrospectives, prioritizing the backlog to resolve **40+ high-priority tickets** and stabilize the developer intake process ahead of a critical production deployment deadline.

Drove alignment across IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement automated **CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and reducing manual release risk for a fleet-wide rollout.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by optimizing end-to-end scoping and invoicing workflows for 200+ monthly proposals, deploying a new CRM process that improved pipeline visibility and accelerated close rates.

Reduced **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and lifted conversions by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing the company website and Google Business profile to improve inbound lead quality.

Improved leadership pricing decisions by conducting **financial profitability analysis** across 1,000+ project records to identify margin leaks and surface data-driven recommendations for cost structure improvements.
